claim: 10Y Treasury yield closes above 4.50% on at least 4 of the 5 trading days in W21 (2026-05-19 through 2026-05-23)
falsification_criteria: 10Y yield closes at or below 4.50% on 2 or more days during W21

claim: XLE total return exceeds XLK total return over the 2-week period ending 2026-05-30 (energy outperforms tech as the sector rotation holds)
falsification_criteria: XLK 2-week return equals or exceeds XLE 2-week return as of the 2026-05-30 close

claim: USO closes above 130 on 2026-05-30 (oil holds at least ~88% of current level, implying no demand-destruction reversal)
falsification_criteria: USO closes at or below 130 on 2026-05-30 (a >12% drawdown from the 2026-05-17 close of ~148)

claim: XLY total return underperforms XLP total return over the 2-week period ending 2026-05-30 (consumer squeeze thesis holds)
falsification_criteria: XLY 2-week return equals or exceeds XLP 2-week return as of the 2026-05-30 close

claim: Fed holds the policy rate unchanged at the June 2026 FOMC meeting
falsification_criteria: Any rate change (cut or hike) is announced at the June 2026 FOMC
